title: 4 PCS Stainless Steel Serving Spoon Set, Long Handle with 3-Wire Clip, for Kitchen Restaurant Banquet Soup Cooking
features: 【Premium Material】The serving spoons are made of stainless steel, durable and will not bend, reusable, mirror polish surface will not scratch your mouth or hands when applied, and the solid and durable construction support a long time use.
【Package Content】You will receive 4 stainless steel dinner spoons and a 3-wire clip. These large dinner spoons are perfect for serving and enjoying your favorite dishes.
【Easy to Clean】Dishwasher-safe, without harsh detergents, you can easily use dishwasher to clean or hand wash for better and longer-lasting maintenance.

【Polishing Design】The mirror polishing process is adopted to make the product look more glossy, smooth mirror-like, showing high-grade quality, and can be used as a gift. The serving spoon set are able to be send to your office colleagues, friends or neighbors as a housewarming gift.

【Wide Application】These spoons are suit for serving can be used for soups, salads, dishes, yogurt, curries, appetizers, mashed potatoes, fillings, stews, stir-fries, fruit platters, fried foods and other foods, very suitable for restaurants, banquets, Buffet, dinner, family gathering, holiday party picnic.
description: 4 PCS Serving Spoon Set, Stainless Steel Serving Spoons Large, Serving Spoons Set with a 3-wire Clip, Long Handle Table Spoons for Serving Kitchen Cooking Restaurant Banquet Functions: Used for serving various foods. Brand: YIMETOP Colour: Silver Weight: 346g Material: Stainless Steel Package Sizes: 25.5 × 18.5 × 2.3cm Package includes: 4 × Stainless Steel Serving Spoons Large 1 × 3-wire Clip Applicable Scenarios: For serving kitchen cooking restaurant banquet.
